name: Waffle Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 eggs or 2 tablespoons ener-G egg substitute
A little Pam cooking spray (enough for a non-stick waffle iron)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate enough potatoes to feed your family.
2. Grate half an onion and add it to the grated potatoes.
3. Add 1 cup of all-purpose flour and 2 eggs or 2 tablespoons of ener-G egg substitute to the potato mixture. Mix well.
4. Drain any excess water from the potato mixture using a fine-mesh sieve.
5. Lightly spray a non-stick waffle iron with a little Pam cooking spray.
6. Pour the potato mixture into the prepared waffle iron and bake until golden brown, about 10-12 minutes.
7. Serve hot with lots of applesauce. If you don't have a non-stick waffle iron, these can be made into pancakes instead.
